subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Though for some time no letter hath been dispatched expressing sentiments of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال مبارک اگرچه چندیست تحریری ارسال نگشت و بیان حسیات محبتی
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @business; financial; property matters, @consolation and comfort
